judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and trading at a high forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $463.32M TTM — positive cash generation.
Consensus buy rating from 36 analysts with a mean target of $358.82.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and Operating margin 0.0% — currently loss-making.
Return on equity -2.5% and Return on assets -2.4% — negative returns on capital.

news.paragraph: BMO Capital Markets believes MongoDB is well-positioned in the database market and possesses durable growth potential. This positive analyst view comes just ahead of the company's upcoming earnings report, which traders will be watching closely for signs of continued expansion. The market will also be assessing whether the current stock price adequately reflects the company's growth prospects.

headlines.title: MongoDB (MDB) Remains Well-Positioned In The Database Market And Has Durable Growth Potential, Says BMO Capital
